creator: mizhka@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 223291
Archive file with full tree

Hi,

It's terraform plugin (sysutils/terraform) to interact with Proxmox infrastructure. 

It's written in golang with modules, but vendor folder is not included in original source code repository. That's why all vendor dependency files are added separately to port. 

Validated against: 
 - portfmt
 - portlint
 - poudriere testport (12.2 and 14-CURRENT)

The full tree is attached as archive file

Thanks!
